name: ai-digest
description: Drafts a weekly cross-department AI-Automation digest (top-3 closed / in-progress / priorities) from the department's own meeting-notes (primary narrative) + ClickUp (the dated 'what closed' signal). Notes-led, every line cited, print-only — a human edits the draft and the lead publishes. Read-only against Drive + ClickUp; makes NO 'verified' claims (the citation is the honesty). Scaffold patterns adapted from Sasha Marchuk's log-time + the sibling daily-call-tasks skill.
